name: CorKLOG
description: [CorKLOG](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1235) is a keylogger known to be leveraged by [Mustang Panda](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0129) and was first observed utilized in 2024. [CorKLOG](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1235) is delivered through a RAR archive (e.g., src.rar), which contains two files: an executable (lcommute.exe) and the [CorKLOG](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S12
